snippet.title: Yabesh Thapa - Firfirey | OFFICIAL MUSIC VIDEO
snippet.description:
Finally releasing 'Firfirey' after 6 years feels a lot, but here we are. I hope this brings back good memories to you as it does to me. This song resonates of pure love and the emotions it holds is immense for me. I can't believe we've come this far.

Thank you for always being a part of the journey !

Written, composed and performed by Yabesh Thapa 

Flute - Shrijan Maharjan
Drums and Additional Percussions - Bikesh Bazra
Mix/Master - Kobid Bazra (Bajra Creation Records)

Visuals by Noisy

Get connected with us
https://www.instagram.com/yabush69/?hl=en

#ghaamchhaya

© 2026 ClassX Presentation

#ORomeo Trailer Out Now!

#SajidNadiadwala presents
A #VishalBhardwaj film

Get ready for romance, chaos, and one unforgettable love story. O’ Romeo is all set to steal hearts. 
Hit ‘I’m Interested’ now for exclusive updates & more only on BookMyShow.
Link: https://bookmy.show/ORomeo

Starring :
Shahid Kapoor
Triptii Dimri
Avinash Tiwary
Farida Jalal 
⁠Vikrant Massey (Special Appearance)
Nana Patekar
⁠Tamannaah Bhatia
Disha Patani 
Aruna Irani
Hussain Dalal 
Rahul Deshpande

Produced By Sajid Nadiadwala

Story: Hussain Zaidi

Music on T-Series

snippet.title: मंदिर के सीढ़ी चढ़ चढ़ मांगू | Ek Mulakat Jaruri Hai sajan | Naga Navtra | Paru Rabari
snippet.description:
यह गीत 1960 के सुनहरे दौर की याद दिलाता है — जब प्यार में सादगी थी, जज़्बात में गहराई थी और हर शब्द में एक कहानी छिपी होती थी।
इस गाने के ज़रिए हम उसी पुराने दौर की महक को आज के सुरों में फिर से ज़िंदा करने की कोशिश कर रहे हैं।

💫 “Old is not just gold… it’s emotion.” 💫

⇨Song : मंदिर के सीढ़ी चढ़ चढ़ मांगू | Ek Mulakat Jaruri Hai sajan

hi.title: मंदिर के सीढ़ी चढ़ चढ़ मांगू | Ek Mulakat Jaruri Hai sajan | Naga Navtra | Paru Rabari
hi.description:
यह गीत 1960 के सुनहरे दौर की याद दिलाता है — जब प्यार में सादगी थी, जज़्बात में गहराई थी और हर शब्द में एक कहानी छिपी होती थी।
इस गाने के ज़रिए हम उसी पुराने दौर की महक को आज के सुरों में फिर से ज़िंदा करने की कोशिश कर रहे हैं।

💫 “Old is not just gold… it’s emotion.” 💫

snippet.description:

IVY ENTERTAINMENT PRESENTS IN ASSOCIATION WITH ACTUAL MOVIES LLP 

फ़िल्म – दक्षिण भारतीय बहू (भोजपुरी फिल्म )
कलाकार – अंजना  सिंह  , राकेश  बाबू  ,अमित  शुक्ला ,विद्या  सिंह  , प्रेम  दुबे  , अनु  ओझा , प्रकाश  जैस , राम बाबू  कंचेर्ल  , जया  नायडू  , जया  राव

कथा - अरविन्द तिवारी
संगीतकार- ओम झा
गीतकार - अरबिंद तिवारी ,  
संकलन -  प्रीतम नाइक

कोरियोग्राफर - प्रवीण शेलार
आर्ट डायरेक्टर - अवदेश राय
निर्माता - संदीप सिंह, अविनाश रोहरा

सॅटॅलाइट और डिजिटल पार्टनर - B4U भोजपुरी

B4U क्रिएटिव टीम – मारुद शर्मा, नेहा उपाध्याय, विशाल यादव 
B4U लीगल - संदीप राणा , तृष्णा पटेल , पूनम शिंदे , आकांक्षा वाकोडे – मोरे IVY – एंटरटेनमेंट - फाइनेंस प्रदीप के दागा , जिनेले मैस्करेन्हास , विपुल जैन , निवृत्ति पाटिल B4U - फाइनेंस संतोष गर्ग , रविंदर साल्वी , साक्षी शैलार

FILM- DAKSHIN BHARTIYA BAHU  (Bhojpuri film)
STARCAST- ANJANA SINGH , RAKESH BABU ,AMIT SHUKLA ,VIDHYA SINGH , PREM DUBEY , ANU OJHA, PRAKASH JAIS, RAMBABU KANCHARLA , JAYA NAIDU , JAYA RAO

snippet.title: Vadh 2 - Official Trailer | Sanjay Mishra, Neena Gupta | Jaspal Singh Sandhu | Luv Films | 6th Feb
snippet.description:
An old prison guard- Shambhunath Mishra (Sanjay Mishra) and a jail inmate- Manju Singh (Neena Gupta) share a bond forged behind prison walls. 

When their ordinary lives are pulled into a moral conflict and truth refuses to surface, they stand at the centre of a choice that has consequences.

#Vadh2 #SanjayMishra #NeenaGupta

A Luv Films presentation, Vadh 2 is written and directed by Jaspal Singh Sandhu and produced by Luv Ranjan and Ankur Garg. The film is slated for a theatrical release on 6th February 2026.

Starring: Sanjay Mishra, Neena Gupta with Kumud Mishra, Amitt K. Singh, Akshay Dogra, Shilpa Shukla & Yogita Bihani
Written & Directed By: Jaspal Singh Sandhu
Produced By: Luv Ranjan & Ankur Garg

snippet.title: Gandhi Talks Trailer | Vijay S | Arvind S | Aditi Rao | A.R.Rahman | Siddharth J |  Releasing 30 Jan
snippet.description:
Not every story needs words.
Some are meant to be felt.

This time, the screen doesn't talk. It makes you listen.

Gandhi Talks, releasing in cinemas worldwide on the 30th of January.

Cast - Vijay Sethupathi, Arvind Swami, Aditi Rao Hydari, Siddharth Jadhav

An A.R. Rahman Musical 

Writer & Director - Kishor Pandurang ‘Belekar’

snippet.title: Dil Lagana Mana Tha (Official MV) Krish & Kishore Mondal | Kunaal V, Devv S | Sanam Johar Ashi Singh
snippet.description:
Dil Lagana Mana Tha (Official MV) Krish & Kishore Mondal | Kunaal V, Devv S | Sanam Johar Ashi Singh

𝑨𝒃𝒐𝒖𝒕 𝒕𝒉𝒆 𝑽𝒊𝒅𝒆𝒐 :-

Dil Lagana Mana Tha is an emotional romantic song that captures the pain of falling in love when the heart was warned not to. This video portrays deep feelings of love, heartbreak, and unspoken emotions, reflecting the journey of a heart that couldn’t resist love despite knowing the consequences. Beautiful visuals and soulful music come together to tell a story many will relate to.

👉 𝑺𝒖𝒃𝒔𝒄𝒓𝒊𝒃𝒆 𝒕𝒐 @𝑹𝑫𝑪𝑴𝒆𝒍𝒐𝒅𝒊𝒆𝒔 𝒇𝒐𝒓 𝒎𝒐𝒓𝒆 𝒓𝒐𝒎𝒂𝒏𝒕𝒊𝒄 𝒉𝒊𝒕𝒔 𝒂𝒏𝒅 𝒏𝒆𝒘 𝒓𝒆𝒍𝒆𝒂𝒔𝒆𝒔!

🎶 𝑺𝑶𝑵𝑮 𝑪𝑹𝑬𝑫𝑰𝑻𝑺 :-
Singer:  Krish & Kishore Mondal 
Starring: Sanam Johar & Ashi Singh
Lyrics: Kunaal Vermaa
Producer: Durgaram Choudhary
Music Composer: Devv Sadaana
Music Arrangement & Programming: Sharan Rawat
Mixing & Mastering: Bhasker Sarma @ Euphony Studio
©️ Koo Koo Tv 
Digital Partner: RDC Media

𝑳𝑰𝑲𝑬, 💬 𝑪𝑶𝑴𝑴𝑬𝑵𝑻 𝒚𝒐𝒖𝒓 𝒇𝒂𝒗𝒐𝒓𝒊𝒕𝒆 𝒍𝒊𝒏𝒆, 𝒂𝒏𝒅 🔁 𝑺𝑯𝑨𝑹𝑬 𝒊𝒕 𝒘𝒊𝒕𝒉 𝒚𝒐𝒖𝒓 𝒇𝒓𝒊𝒆𝒏𝒅𝒔.

🎬 𝑪𝑨𝑺𝑻 & 𝑪𝑹𝑬𝑾 :-
Director: Honey
Choreographer: Debu
Director of Photography (DOP): Karan
Project Head: Israr Ahmad
Video Creator: Screenshot Digital

Assistant Directors:
Shivani, Mukesh Tiwari

Still Photography & BTS: Chand Khan
DI (Colorist): Aman Kumar Kashyap
VFX: Mega Motion

Make-up & Hair: Guddu
Casting Director: Mujeeb Khan

Post Production: Screenshot Digital Studio
Editor: Aaditya Jangid
Art Director: Manoj Bhoyar

Production Executive: Ghani
Dressman: Sujeet
Costume Stylist: Adil Apperal
Dancer Costumes: Nishita
Dancer Management: Nikunj

Spot Boys: Anis, Madan

𝑳𝒚𝒓𝒊𝒄𝒔 :
Zamaane ki taraah
Hum bhi tode hain gaye
Aise tanha to na the Tanha chode hain gaye

Na dil se vo yaadein jaayein
Na raaton ko neendein aayein
Aate hain phir khwab kyu
Aate hain kyu khaab
Jo thi tere ishq mein doobi
Un ankhon mein tum le aaye
Aasu behisaab kyu
Aasu behisaab
Khair hai yaaron kam se kam
Jaan se jaa na paaye hum
Khair hai yaaron kam se kam
Jaan se jaa na paaye hum
Inkaar ke bahaane kayi baar karte karte

Humne wahin lagaya dil
Jahaan dil lagana mana tha
Akhir wahin kiye sajde jahan
Sar jhukana mana tha
Kyu zindagi bita di jahaan pe
ik pal bitaana mana tha
Kyu us gali mein rehte they hum
Jahaan roz jaana mana tha

Zamaane ki taraah
Hum bhi tode hain gaye
Aise tanha to na the Tanha chode hain gaye
Jo duaayein dete they
Haan usi ke hothon se
Aise waise lafz bhi
Humse bole hain gaye

baitho kisi roz tanhai mein
Rakho samne wakt ke aaine
Jo aagea chehra nazar vo kahin
Tumhe bewafa kehke has na pade

Tujhe dil diya istemaal huye
Hai tujhmein bhi dil ye khayaal rahe
Tujhe dil diya istemaal huye
Hai tujhmein bhi dil ye khayaal rahe

Humne jalaaya dil jahaan diye bhi jalaana mana tha
Kar baithe yaad vo chehra jisko bhulaana mana tha
Hum aazmaye gaye magar unhe aazmana mana tha
Humne wahin lagaya dil jahan dil lagana mana tha

Zamaane ki taraah
Hum bhi tode hain gaye
Aise tanha to na the Tanha chode hain gaye
Jo duaayein dete they
Haan usi ke hothon se
Aise waise lafz bhi
Humse bole hain gaye

             मुखड़ा-
कलयुग में रिश्ता चिपरी पाथता हो 
दामदा सासे के गाथता 
को०- कलयुग में रिश्ता चिपरी पाथता हो 
दामदा सासे के गाथता 
आरे सासे के गाथता हो सासे के गाथता 
को०- सासे के गाथता हो सासे के गाथता
आरे जाहवा ना नाथे के उहवा नाथता हो 
दामदा सासे के गाथता 
को०- कलयुग में रिश्ता चिपरी पाथता हो 
दामदा सासे के गाथता - 2
             अंतरा - 01
होली में अपना सागा बेटी के धोखा देके   
को०- बेटी के धोखा देके बेटी के धोखा देके
भाग गईल बिया राड़ी दमदे के लेके 
को०- दमदे के लेके हो दमदे के लेके 
होली में अपना सागा बेटी के धोखा देके   
भाग गईल बिया राड़ी दमदे के लेके
सासे के लहंगा में दमी काछता हो 
दामदा सासे के गाथता
को०- कलयुग में रिश्ता चिपरी पाथता हो 
दामदा सासे के गाथता - 2
               अंतरा - 02
हाय रे इ कलयुग कहवा ले जाई 
को०- कहवा ले जाई हो कहवा ले जाई
बेटी के खाना अब माईये रोज खाई 
को०- माई रोज खाई हो माई रोज खाई 
हाय रे इ कलयुग कहवा ले जाई 
बेटी के खाना अब माईये  रोज खाई 
ससुई के हो रोज खेतवा पाटता हो
दामदा सासे के गाथता
को०- कलयुग में रिश्ता चिपरी पाथता हो 
दामदा सासे के गाथता - 2

snippet.title: Qubool (Full Video) | Haq | Vishal Mishra | Armaan Khan | Yami Gautam & Emraan Hashmi | Hindi Song
snippet.description:
Times Music presents the official full video song “Qubool” from the movie Haq. With heartfelt lyrics & soulful vocals, Qubool captures the raw essence of love.

Whether you're in love, healing, or simply a fan of meaningful love songs, 'Qubool' is a song that speaks to the heart. It's the kind of track you’ll want to put on repeat.

#Qubool #HAqSongs #LoveSong #RomanticSong #NewSong #TrendingSong #YamiGautam #EmraanHashmi #VishalMishra #ArmaanKhan #QuboolHai #NewTrendingSong  #DekhoZaraDekhoNaamTeraLikhaHai

👉🏻 SUBSCRIBE to Times Music - https://bit.ly/tmchnl

Like || Share || Spread || Love

https://youtube.com/@timesmusicindia

Cast- Yami Gautam, Emraan Hashmi, Vartika Singh, Danish Husain, Sheeba Chadha, Aseem Hattangady
Directed by- Suparn S Varma
Produced by- Vineet Jain
Produced by- Vishal Gurnani, Juhi Parekh Mehta, Harman Baweja
Co-Produced by- Amrita Pandey, Suparn S Varma, Rowena Baweja, Sandeep Singh
Written by- Reshu Nath | Music by - Vishal Mishra

Song Credits 
Composer : Vishal Mishra
Lyrics : Kaushal Kishore
Singer : Armaan Khan 
Arrangement & Production : Vishal Mishra
Music Production by : Gaurav Vaswani
Additional Production : Kandarpa Kalita, Bitupon Boruah
Additional Vocals - Vishal Mishra 
Music Assistant : Kumar Gaurav Singh, Trihangku Lahkar, Bitupon Boruah
Mixed & Mastered by : Trihangku Lahkar @VMS

Bass : Aalaap Raju
Strokes : Tapas Roy
Acoustic Guitar : Kandarpa Kalita
Live Rhythm Arranged by : Prashant Sonagra & Swaranjay Dhumal
Tabla : Prashant Sonagra
Dholak : Mushtak Khan & Ishteyak Khan
Percussions : Swaranjay Dhumal, Prashant Sonagra, Harsh Bhoir & Mohit Kathak

Live Rhythms, Strokes Recorded at YRF Studio by : Vijay Dayal, Sagar Sathe
Guitars, Vocals Recorded at VMS by : Trihangku Lahkar & Bitupon Boruah

Lyrics Of Song ‘Qubool’
 
Mila Asmaan Se Koi Noor Kohinoor Dastoor Mera
Lo Aaj Se Hua Main Sadiyon Ko Tera
 
Dekho Zara Dekho Naam Tera Likha Hai
Mera Hai Jo Mera Sab Tera Ho Chuka Hai
 
Dil Pe Ab Na Zor Koi
Har Qadam Teri Or Hai
Saans Hai Khushboo Bhari
Har Raasta Ab Phool Hai
 
Koi Shart Ho Ya Dard Ho
Yeh Raabta Qubool Hai
Har Saans Hai Khushboo Bhari
Har Raasta Qubool Hai
 
Koi Shart Ho

Qubool Teri Zid Hai Saari
Saari Baatein Qubool Hain
Qubool Saare Din Tumhaare
Siyah Raatein Qubool Hain
 
Tu Saaye-Baan Tu, Teri Chaanv Mein Khud Ko Bhulakar Jhoom Loon
Yoon Tera Hoon, Tu Dard De To Dard Ko Bhi Choom Loon
Muskuraana Hai Tujhi Se Tujhse hi Aaraam hai
Tu Nahi To Main Nahi Hoon
Zindagi Tere Naam Hai
Tu Na To Main Bemaaine
Hona Mera Hi Fizool Hai
Koi Shart Ho Ya Dard Ho
Yeh Raabta Qubool Hai
 
Hai Ishq Mein Jab Doobe Hum
Gham Bhi Mile To Kaisa Gham
Tera Sahi Tera Ghalat
Tera Jhooth Bhi To Qubool Hai
Accha Bura Kya Tolna
Kya Mashwara Kya Sochna
Mahboob Hota Hai Khuda
Yahi Ishq Ka To Usool Hai

Live Rhythms, Strokes Recorded at YRF Studio by : Vijay Dayal, Sagar Sathe
Guitars, Vocals Recorded at VMS by : Trihangku Lahkar & Bitupon Boruah

Lyrics Of Song ‘Qubool’
 
Mila Asmaan Se Koi Noor Kohinoor Dastoor Mera
Lo Aaj Se Hua Main Sadiyon Ko Tera
 
Dekho Zara Dekho Naam Tera Likha Hai
Mera Hai Jo Mera Sab Tera Ho Chuka Hai
 
Dil Pe Ab Na Zor Koi
Har Qadam Teri Or Hai
Saans Hai Khushboo Bhari
Har Raasta Ab Phool Hai
 
Koi Shart Ho Ya Dard Ho
Yeh Raabta Qubool Hai
Har Saans Hai Khushboo Bhari
Har Raasta Qubool Hai
 
Koi Shart Ho

Qubool Teri Zid Hai Saari
Saari Baatein Qubool Hain
Qubool Saare Din Tumhaare
Siyah Raatein Qubool Hain
 
Tu Saaye-Baan Tu, Teri Chaanv Mein Khud Ko Bhulakar Jhoom Loon
Yoon Tera Hoon, Tu Dard De To Dard Ko Bhi Choom Loon
Muskuraana Hai Tujhi Se Tujhse hi Aaraam hai
Tu Nahi To Main Nahi Hoon
Zindagi Tere Naam Hai
Tu Na To Main Bemaaine
Hona Mera Hi Fizool Hai
Koi Shart Ho Ya Dard Ho
Yeh Raabta Qubool Hai
 
Hai Ishq Mein Jab Doobe Hum
Gham Bhi Mile To Kaisa Gham
Tera Sahi Tera Ghalat
Tera Jhooth Bhi To Qubool Hai
Accha Bura Kya Tolna
Kya Mashwara Kya Sochna
Mahboob Hota Hai Khuda
Yahi Ishq Ka To Usool Hai

en.description:
Times Music presents the official full video song “Qubool” from the movie Haq. With heartfelt lyrics & soulful vocals, Qubool captures the raw essence of love.

Whether you're in love, healing, or simply a fan of meaningful love songs, 'Qubool' is a song that speaks to the heart. It's the kind of track you’ll want to put on repeat.

snippet.description:

Badri Sapkota Presents: New Nepali Song 2082

|| Manung Kotaima ||

Roshan Devkota
Sarjan Thapa Magar / Puran Magar & Team
Shailesh Sunam & Umbrella Resort, Manungkot

Lyrics: 
Lu hai Manungkotaima mero dil basyo lali othaimaa.
Lu hai manung kotaima najar nalagau lali othaima.

Pirati lam na ta Saili ghumna lai jamna ta.
Pirati launna ma Saila ekdine pauna sa.

Oi hoi damauli katesi madiko pool hitaiko mayalai gulab ko phool.

Ghara mero rukumai timi Mam pareu ukhumai.
Ghar mero tanahu ho launa ke bhanam bhanam bho.

Na rup maa khot timro sundar gulabi otha timro.
Ke hereu tesari o kho laaj lagyo besari.

O hoi marsyandi salala paniko bhel kisimai raichha ni mayako khel.

Tan ramro Mam ramro timi lajauda jhan ramro.
Jiu pani kasilo timro muharai hasilo.

Ke socheu bhanata timle paraichheu Manata.
Ma ta gurung ki chhori ho mero khyalmai dil chori bho.

Thakur Pokhrel
Krishna Prasad Adhikari
Binita Adhikari
Amar Rawal
Roshan Devkota
Sarjan Thapa Magar / Puran Magar & Team
Shailesh Sunam & Umbrella Resort, Manungkot

Lyrics: 
Lu hai Manungkotaima mero dil basyo lali othaimaa.
Lu hai manung kotaima najar nalagau lali othaima.

Pirati lam na ta Saili ghumna lai jamna ta.
Pirati launna ma Saila ekdine pauna sa.

Oi hoi damauli katesi madiko pool hitaiko mayalai gulab ko phool.

Ghara mero rukumai timi Mam pareu ukhumai.
Ghar mero tanahu ho launa ke bhanam bhanam bho.

Na rup maa khot timro sundar gulabi otha timro.
Ke hereu tesari o kho laaj lagyo besari.

O hoi marsyandi salala paniko bhel kisimai raichha ni mayako khel.

Tan ramro Mam ramro timi lajauda jhan ramro.
Jiu pani kasilo timro muharai hasilo.

Ke socheu bhanata timle paraichheu Manata.
Ma ta gurung ki chhori ho mero khyalmai dil chori bho.

snippet.title: Figure Timro Dami · फिगर तिम्रो दामी - Official MV
snippet.description:
https://www.tiktok.com/@kumarbmzn  https://www.facebook.com/Kumarbmzntamang 

“𝗙𝗶𝗴𝘂𝗿𝗲 𝗧𝗶𝗺𝗿𝗼 𝗗𝗮𝗺𝗶” · 𝗕𝗶𝘀𝗵𝘄𝗼 𝗗𝗼𝗻𝗴 | 𝗦𝗵𝗮𝗻𝘁𝗶 𝗦𝗵𝗿𝗲𝗲 𝗣𝗮𝗿𝗶𝘆𝗮𝗿 | 𝗞𝘂𝗺𝗮𝗿 𝗕𝗼𝗺𝗷𝗮𝗻 | Ashish Manandhar | Rasmila Tamang.

          After the amazing response to the “𝗙𝗶𝗴𝘂𝗿𝗲 𝗧𝗶𝗺𝗿𝗼 𝗗𝗮𝗺𝗶” 𝗔𝘂𝗱𝗶𝗼 𝗦𝗼𝗻𝗴, we are excited to present the 𝗢𝗳𝗳𝗶𝗰𝗶𝗮𝗹 𝗠𝘂𝘀𝗶𝗰 𝗩𝗶𝗱𝗲𝗼. This release is a result of the immense love, support, and encouragement from all our viewers and listeners. We hope you enjoy this visual presentation just as much as you enjoyed the audio. Your continuous support motivates us to create more music and creative content in the future.
       
This music video features 𝗥𝗮𝘀𝗺𝗶𝗹𝗮 𝗧𝗮𝗺𝗮𝗻𝗴 and 𝗔𝘀𝗵𝗶𝘀𝗵 𝗠𝗮𝗻𝗮𝗻𝗱𝗵𝗮𝗿 in the lead roles. Ashish Manandhar is a highly talented dancer, experienced dance instructor, and versatile model. The video highlights 𝘃𝗶𝗿𝗮𝗹 𝘀𝘁𝗲𝗽 𝗱𝗮𝗻𝗰𝗲 𝗰𝗵𝗼𝗿𝗲𝗼𝗴𝗿𝗮𝗽𝗵𝘆 𝗰𝗿𝗲𝗮𝘁𝗲𝗱 𝗯𝘆 𝗔𝘀𝗵𝗶𝘀𝗵 𝗠𝗮𝗻𝗮𝗻𝗱𝗵𝗮𝗿, which has become a major attraction of the song. Representing the Tamang community, 𝗥𝗮𝘀𝗺𝗶𝗹𝗮 𝗧𝗮𝗺𝗮𝗻𝗴 is a beautiful and hardworking model, widely recognized for her impressive performances in popular music videos. The music video is 𝗰𝗵𝗼𝗿𝗲𝗼𝗴𝗿𝗮𝗽𝗵𝗲𝗱 𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝗱𝗶𝗿𝗲𝗰𝘁𝗲𝗱 𝗯𝘆 𝗠𝗮𝘂𝘀𝗮𝗺 𝗛𝗶𝗺𝗮𝗹𝗶, an accomplished director known for delivering several superhit Nepali songs. 
     
🎤 This is also the 𝗳𝗶𝗿𝘀𝘁-𝗲𝘃𝗲𝗿 𝗱𝘂𝗲𝘁 𝘀𝗼𝗻𝗴 𝗯𝘆 𝗕𝗶𝘀𝗵𝘄𝗼 𝗗𝗼𝗻𝗴 and 𝗦𝗵𝗮𝗻𝘁𝗶 𝗦𝗵𝗿𝗲𝗲 𝗣𝗮𝗿𝗶𝘆𝗮𝗿, with the song written by 𝗞𝘂𝗺𝗮𝗿 𝗕𝗼𝗺𝗷𝗮𝗻, making it a special and memorable collaboration for everyone involved.

🎧 Enjoy the perfect blend of a catchy melody, dancing vibe, witty lyrics, and pure Nepali vibes.
 
Please don’t forget to 𝗟𝗶𝗸𝗲, 𝗦𝗵𝗮𝗿𝗲, 𝗦𝘂𝗯𝘀𝗰𝗿𝗶𝗯𝗲 and leave your valuable feedback in the comments below.
Thank you for the continued love and support ❤️

Presented by 𝗞𝘂𝗺𝗮𝗿𝗯𝗺𝘇𝗻  | Music Distribution Partner 𝗠𝘂𝘀𝗶𝗰 𝗦𝗽𝗮𝗿𝗸.

♫ 𝗢𝗳𝗳𝗶𝗰𝗶𝗮𝗹 𝗔𝘂𝗱𝗶𝗼 𝗖𝗿𝗲𝗱𝗶𝘁:
✎ Lyricist: Kumarbmzn 
♪ Music Composer: Bishwo Dong 
🎙 Singer: Bishwo Dong and Shanti Shree Pariyar
🎸 Music Arranger: Bishwo Dong
🎛️ Mixing Master: Dipesh Pradhan
🎧 Rec.: Dong Studio 

🎬 𝗢𝗳𝗳𝗶𝗰𝗶𝗮𝗹 𝗩𝗶𝗱𝗲𝗼 𝗖𝗿𝗲𝗱𝗶𝘁:
🎭 Artist: Rasmila Tamang | Ashish Manandhar 
🎞 Production Manager: Milan Katwal
🧥Wardrobe : Valentino The Boutique 
💅🏻 MUA: Sarita Prajapati
🎥 Cinematographer: Nabaraj Uprety
𓀤𓀥 Viral Step By: Ashish Manandhar
✂ Edit | Color | GFX: Manoj Karki
📽 Choreography | Direction: Mausam Himali 
🖼️ Post Production: Luminous Postwork

          After the amazing response to the “𝗙𝗶𝗴𝘂𝗿𝗲 𝗧𝗶𝗺𝗿𝗼 𝗗𝗮𝗺𝗶” 𝗔𝘂𝗱𝗶𝗼 𝗦𝗼𝗻𝗴, we are excited to present the 𝗢𝗳𝗳𝗶𝗰𝗶𝗮𝗹 𝗠𝘂𝘀𝗶𝗰 𝗩𝗶𝗱𝗲𝗼. This release is a result of the immense love, support, and encouragement from all our viewers and listeners. We hope you enjoy this visual presentation just as much as you enjoyed the audio. Your continuous support motivates us to create more music and creative content in the future.
       
This music video features 𝗥𝗮𝘀𝗺𝗶𝗹𝗮 𝗧𝗮𝗺𝗮𝗻𝗴 and 𝗔𝘀𝗵𝗶𝘀𝗵 𝗠𝗮𝗻𝗮𝗻𝗱𝗵𝗮𝗿 in the lead roles. Ashish Manandhar is a highly talented dancer, experienced dance instructor, and versatile model. The video highlights 𝘃𝗶𝗿𝗮𝗹 𝘀𝘁𝗲𝗽 𝗱𝗮𝗻𝗰𝗲 𝗰𝗵𝗼𝗿𝗲𝗼𝗴𝗿𝗮𝗽𝗵𝘆 𝗰𝗿𝗲𝗮𝘁𝗲𝗱 𝗯𝘆 𝗔𝘀𝗵𝗶𝘀𝗵 𝗠𝗮𝗻𝗮𝗻𝗱𝗵𝗮𝗿, which has become a major attraction of the song. Representing the Tamang community, 𝗥𝗮𝘀𝗺𝗶𝗹𝗮 𝗧𝗮𝗺𝗮𝗻𝗴 is a beautiful and hardworking model, widely recognized for her impressive performances in popular music videos. The music video is 𝗰𝗵𝗼𝗿𝗲𝗼𝗴𝗿𝗮𝗽𝗵𝗲𝗱 𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝗱𝗶𝗿𝗲𝗰𝘁𝗲𝗱 𝗯𝘆 𝗠𝗮𝘂𝘀𝗮𝗺 𝗛𝗶𝗺𝗮𝗹𝗶, an accomplished director known for delivering several superhit Nepali songs. 
     
🎤 This is also the 𝗳𝗶𝗿𝘀𝘁-𝗲𝘃𝗲𝗿 𝗱𝘂𝗲𝘁 𝘀𝗼𝗻𝗴 𝗯𝘆 𝗕𝗶𝘀𝗵𝘄𝗼 𝗗𝗼𝗻𝗴 and 𝗦𝗵𝗮𝗻𝘁𝗶 𝗦𝗵𝗿𝗲𝗲 𝗣𝗮𝗿𝗶𝘆𝗮𝗿, with the song written by 𝗞𝘂𝗺𝗮𝗿 𝗕𝗼𝗺𝗷𝗮𝗻, making it a special and memorable collaboration for everyone involved.

🎧 Enjoy the perfect blend of a catchy melody, dancing vibe, witty lyrics, and pure Nepali vibes.
 
Please don’t forget to 𝗟𝗶𝗸𝗲, 𝗦𝗵𝗮𝗿𝗲, 𝗦𝘂𝗯𝘀𝗰𝗿𝗶𝗯𝗲 and leave your valuable feedback in the comments below.

snippet.title: Minecraft Speedrunner VS 5 Hunters REVIVAL
snippet.description:
You voted for it. Time to take on 5 hunters. The hunters are back and better than ever. Will we AT LAST move on to 6 hunters?

Follow my socials:
➽ Twitter - @dream
➽ Instagram - @dreamwastaken
➽ Snapchat - @dream

BadBoyHalo: @thesaintsofgames 
George: @GeorgeNotFound 
Sapnap: @Sapnap 
Antfrost: @Antfrost 
awesamdude: @awesamdude 

Seed: 935327412
Version: 1.21.11

We decided to call this series Minecraft Manhunt. This video is a different rendition of it, where there is FIVE hunters. The 6th rendition of the 5 hunters series, the revival...

This is a new Minecraft but, 1.21.11 challenge that we have decided to try. I try to beat the game, while my friends George and Sapnap and BadBoyHalo and Antfrost  and Awesamdude try to prevent me from doing it. It's a race, and it's super intense and we had a lot of laughs. I love doing these challenges.

(Most) Music is from: @dreamproductionsXD 

#MinecraftManhunt

te.title: మైన్‌క్రాఫ్ట్ స్పీడ్‌రన్నర్ VS 5 హంటర్స్ పునరుద్ధరణ
te.description:
మీరు దీనికి ఓటు వేశారు. 5 మంది వేటగాళ్లను ఎదుర్కోవాల్సిన సమయం ఆసన్నమైంది. వేటగాళ్ళు తిరిగి వచ్చారు మరియు గతంలో కంటే మెరుగ్గా ఉన్నారు. మనం చివరికి 6 మంది వేటగాళ్ల వైపు వెళ్తామా?

Follow my socials:
➽ Twitter - @Dream
➽ Instagram - @Dreamwastaken
➽ Snapchat - @Dream

BadBoyHalo:    @thesaintsofgames
George:     @GeorgeNotFound
Sapnap:     @Sapnap
Antfrost:  @Antfrost
Awesamdude: @Awesamdude

Seed: 935327412
Version: 1.21.11

ఈ సిరీస్‌కి మేము Minecraft Manhunt అని పేరు పెట్టాలని నిర్ణయించుకున్నాము. ఈ వీడియో దాని యొక్క భిన్నమైన వెర్షన్, ఇక్కడ ఐదుగురు వేటగాళ్ళు ఉన్నారు. 5 వేటగాళ్ళు సిరీస్ యొక్క 6వ వెర్షన్, పునరుద్ధరణ...

ఇది కొత్త Minecraft కానీ, 1.21.11 సవాలును మేము ప్రయత్నించాలని నిర్ణయించుకున్నాము. నేను ఆటను ఓడించడానికి ప్రయత్నిస్తాను, అయితే నా స్నేహితులు జార్జ్ మరియు సప్నాప్ మరియు బాడ్‌బాయ్‌హాలో మరియు ఆంట్‌ఫ్రాస్ట్ నన్ను దీన్ని చేయకుండా నిరోధించడానికి ప్రయత్నిస్తారు. ఇది ఒక రేసు, మరియు ఇది చాలా తీవ్రమైనది మరియు మేము చాలా నవ్వుకున్నాము. నాకు ఈ సవాళ్లను చేయడం చాలా ఇష్టం.

(Most) Music is from: ​⁠  @DreamproductionsXD

#MinecraftManhunt

pt.title: Minecraft Speedrunner VS 5 Caçadores A RETOMADA
pt.description:
Vocês votaram por isso. É hora de enfrentar 5 caçadores. Os caçadores estão de volta e melhores do que nunca. Será que vamos ENFIM passar para 6 caçadores?

Siga minhas redes sociais:
➽ Twitter - @Dream
➽ Instagram - @Dreamwastaken
➽ Snapchat - @Dream

BadBoyHalo:    @thesaintsofgames
George:     @GeorgeNotFound
Sapnap:     @Sapnap
Antfrost:  @Antfrost
Awesamdude: @Awesamdude

Seed: 935327412
Versão: 1.21.11

Nós decidimos chamar esta série de Minecraft Manhunt. Esse vídeo é uma versão diferente do jogo, com CINCO caçadores. A sexta versão da série com 5 caçadores, a retomada...

Essa é uma nova versão do Minecraft 1.21.11 que nós decidimos testar. Eu tento zerar o jogo, enquanto meus amigos George, Sapnap, BadBoyHalo e Awesamdude tentam me impedir. É uma corrida, e é super intenso e nós rimos muito. Eu amo fazer esse tipo de desafio. 

A maioria das músicas é de: @DreamproductionsXD

#MinecraftManhunt

tr.title: Minecraft Speedrunner VS 5 Avcı YENİDEN
tr.description:
Siz oy verdiniz. 5 avcıya karşı mücadele zamanı. Avcılar geri döndü ve her zamankinden daha iyiler. Sonunda 6 avcıya geçebilecek miyiz?

BadBoyHalo: @thesaintsofgames
George: @GeorgeNotFound
Sapnap: @Sapnap
Antfrost: @Antfrost
Awesamdude: @Awesamdude

Bu seriye Minecraft Manhunt adını vermeye karar verdik. Bu video, beş avcının olduğu farklı bir versiyonudur. 5 Avcı serisinin 6. versiyonu, yeniden...

Bu, denemeye karar verdiğimiz yeni bir Minecraft 1.21.11 meydan okuması. Ben oyunu bitirmeye çalışırken, arkadaşlarım George, Sapnap, BadBoyHalo, Antfrost ve Awesamdude beni engellemeye çalışıyor. Bu bir yarış ve çok heyecanlıydı, çok eğlendik. Bu meydan okumaları yapmayı çok seviyorum.

(Çoğu) Müzik şuradan: ​⁠ @DreamproductionsXD

#MinecraftManhunt

ko.title: 마인크래프트 스피드러너 VS 헌터 5명 재대결
ko.description:
여러분이 원하신 겁니다. 헌터 다섯명에게 맞설 시간이 왔어요. 헌터들은 전보다도 더 실력이 좋아진 상태로 돌아왔죠. 마침내 여섯 헌터까지 갈 수 있을까요?

제 SNS를 팔로우하세요:
➽ Twitter - @Dream
➽ Instagram - @Dreamwastaken
➽ Snapchat - @Dream

BadBoyHalo:   @thesaintsofgames
George:    @GeorgeNotFound
Sapnap:    @Sapnap
Antfrost: @Antfrost
Awesamdude: @Awesamdude

시드: 935327412
버전: 1.21.11

이 시리즈를 '마인크래프트 맨헌트'라고 부르기로 했습니다. 이 영상은 원조 마인크래프트 맨헌트의 새로운 변주 버전으로, 헌터가 다섯 명입니다. 5헌터 시리즈의 여섯 번째 작품이자, 그 부활편이죠...

1.21.11 버전에서 진행된 새로운 '마인크래프트, 하지만...' 챌린지입니다. 제 친구 조지와 샙냅과 배드보이헤일로와 앤트프로스트와 어쌤듀드가 저를 방해하는 동안, 저는 게임을 깨려고 노력합니다. 정말 치열했고, 동시에 엄청 재미있는 대결이었습니다. 이 챌린지들을 하는 게 정말 즐거워요.

(거의 모든) 음악: ​⁠  @DreamproductionsXD

#MinecraftManhunt

pl.title: Minecraft Speedrunner VS 5 Łowców POWTÓRKA
pl.description:
Zagłosowaliście. Czas na starcie z 5 łowcami. Łowcy powracają i są silniejsi niż kiedykolwiek dotąd. Czy uda nam się FINALNIE dotrzeć do 6 łowców?

Zaobserwuj mnie również na:
➽ Twitter - @Dream
➽ Instagram - @Dreamwastaken
➽ Snapchat - @Dream

BadBoyHalo:    @thesaintsofgames
George:     @GeorgeNotFound
Sapnap:     @Sapnap
Antfrost:  @Antfrost
Awesamdude: @Awesamdude

Seed: 935327412
Wersja: 1.21.11

Zadecydowaliśmy nazwać tę serię Minecraft Manhunt. Ten film to inna wersja, w której występuje PIĘCIU łowców. Szósta odsłona serii 5 łowców, powtórka...

Jest to najnowszy "Minecraft, ale" gdzie wyzwanie jest z wersji 1.21.11, które postanowiliśmy podjąć. Próbuję przejść grę, a w tym czasie moi przyjaciele George i Sapnap oraz BadBoyHalo, Antfrost i Awesamdude próbują mnie powstrzymać. Jest to wyścig, który był bardzo intensywny i mieliśmy przy nim wielki ubaw. Uwielbiam podejmować takie wyzwania.

Muzyka (Większość) pochodzi z: ​⁠ @DreamproductionsXD

#MinecraftManhunt

bn.title: মাইনক্রাফ্ট স্পীড রানার ও ৫ হান্টারের পুনরলড়াই
bn.description:
তোমরা এর জন্য ভোট করেছো। সময় এসেছে ৫ হান্টারের বিরুদ্ধে লড়াই । হান্টাররা ফেরত এসেছে এবং আগের চেয়ে শক্তিশালী হয়ে । আমরা কি সর্বশেষে ৬ হান্টারের দিকে এগোবো?

আবার সোশ্যাল ফলো করো:
➽ টুইটার - @Dream
➽ ইনস্টাগ্রাম - @Dreamwastaken
➽ স্ন্যাপচ্যাট - @Dream

ব্যাডবয়হেলো:    @thesaintsofgames
জর্জ:     @GeorgeNotFound
স্যাপন্যাপ:     @Sapnap
অ্যান্টফ্রস্ট:  @Antfrost
অসোমডুড: @Awesamdude

সিড: 935327412
ভার্শন: ১.২১.১১

আমরা এ সিরিজকে মাইনক্রাফ্ট ম্যানহান্ট বলার সিদ্ধান্ত নিয়েছি। এই ভিডিও তারই পুনর চেষ্টা, যেখানে ৫ জন হান্টার আছে। ৫ হান্টারের ষষ্ঠ খেলা পুনরলড়াই...

এটা মাইনক্রাফট কিন্তু, ১.২১.১১ এর একটি চ্যালেঞ্জ যা আমরা করার সিদ্ধান্ত নিয়েছি । আমি গেমটি হারানোর চেষ্টা করব। যখন আমার বন্ধু জর্জ, স্যাপন্যাপ, ব্যাডবইহেলো এবং অ্যানফ্রস্ট আমাকে থামানোর চেষ্টা করবে। এটা একটা প্রতিযোগিতা এবং ‌ এটা অত্যন্ত তুখোর আর আমরা এটা করে অনেক মজা পেয়েছিলাম । আমি এরকম চ্যালেঞ্জ করতে পছন্দ করি।

(বেশিরভাগ) গান এসেছে: ⁠  @DreamproductionsXD

#MinecraftManhunt

We decided to call this series Minecraft Manhunt. This video is a different rendition of it, where there is FIVE hunters. The 6th rendition of the 5 hunters series, the revival...

हमने इसे “Minecraft Manhunt” सीरीज़ कहने का तय किया था। यह वीडियो इसका एक अलग संस्करण है, जहाँ 5 हंटर्स हैं। 5 हंटर्स सीरीज़ का छठा संस्करण...

Версія: 1.21.11

Ми вирішили назвати ці серії Майнкрафт Менхантом. Це відео це інша інтерпретація, де є П'ЯТЬ мисливці. Це 6 версія серії з 5 мисливцями, відродження...

Це новий Майнкрафт, але 1.21.10 виклик що ми вирішили спробувати. Я намагаюсь пройти гру, поки мої друзі Джордж і Сепнеп і БедБойХало і Антфрост і Авсемдуд намагаються не дати мені цього зробити. Це перегони і вони дуже інтенсивні і ми мали над чим посміятись. Люблю займатись цими викликами. 

(Більшість) Музики з:   @DreamproductionsXD

#MinecraftManhunt

de.title: Minecraft Speedrunner gegen 5 Jäger NEUAUFLAGE
de.description:
Ihr habt abgestimmt. Zeit um es mit 5 Jägern aufzunehmen. Die Jäger sind zurück und sie sind besser denn je. Werden wir ENDLICH zu 6 Jägern aufsteigen?

Folge mir auf Social Media:
➽ Twitter - @Dream
➽ Instagram - @Dreamwastaken
➽ Snapchat - @Dream

BadBoyHalo:    @thesaintsofgames
George:     @GeorgeNotFound
Sapnap:     @Sapnap
Antfrost:  @Antfrost
Awesamdude: @Awesamdude

Version: 1.21.11

Wir haben diese Serie "Minecraft Manhunt" genannt. Dieses Video ist eine etwas andere Version davon: Es gibt FÜNF Jäger. Die sechste Auflage der 5 Jäger Serie, die Neuauflage...

Das ist eine neue "Minecraft, aber" Herausforderung, in Version 1.21.10, die wir ausprobieren. Ich versuche, das Spiel zu besiegen, während meine Freunde George und Sapnap und BadBoyHalo und Antfrost und Awesamdude versuchen, mich daran zu hindern. Es ist ein Wettlauf, super spannend und wir haben jede Menge gelacht. Ich liebe diese Herausforderungen.


Die (meiste) Musik ist von: ​⁠  @DreamproductionsXD

#MinecraftManhunt

bg.title: Minecraft спийдрънър срещу 5-ма ловци REVIVAL
bg.description:
Вие гласувахте за това. Време е да се изправя срещу петима ловци. Ловците са обратно тук и по-добри от всякога. Дали НАЙ-НАКРАЯ ще достигнем до шестима ловци?

Последвайте ме в социалните мрежи:
➽ Twitter - @Dream
➽ Instagram - @Dreamwastaken
➽ Snapchat - @Dream

BadBoyHalo:    @thesaintsofgames
George:     @GeorgeNotFound
Sapnap:     @Sapnap
Antfrost:  @Antfrost
Awesamdude: @Awesamdude

Версия: 1.21.11

Решихме да наречем тази поредица Minecraft Manhunt. Това видео е различно нейно изпълнение, където има ПЕТИМА ловци. Шестото издание на поредицата с петима ловци, the revival...

Това е ново Minecraft, но 1.21.11 предизвикателство, което решихме да опитаме. Опитвам се да превъртя играта, докато моите приятели George, Sapnap, BadBoyHalo, Antfrost и Awesamdude се опитват да ме спрат. Супер интензивна надпревара е и се забавлявахме доста. Обичам да правя тези предизвикателства.

Decidimos llamar a esta serie Minecraft Manhunt.
Este video es una versión diferente, donde hay CINCO cazadores.
La sexta entrega de la serie de 5 cazadores, el resurgimiento...

ta.title: மைன்கிராஃப்ட் ஸ்பீட்ரன்னர் vs 5 ஹண்டர்ஸ் மறுமலர்ச்சி
ta.description:
நீங்க அதுக்கு வாக்களிச்சுட்டீங்க. 5 வேட்டைக்காரர்களை எதிர்கொள்ள வேண்டிய நேரம் இது. வேட்டைக்காரர்கள் திரும்பி வந்துட்டாங்க, எப்பவும் இல்லாத அளவுக்கு நல்லா இருக்காங்க. கடைசியிலயாவது 6 வேட்டைக்காரர்களை நோக்கி போவோமா?

Follow my socials:
➽ Twitter - @Dream
➽ Instagram - @Dreamwastaken
➽ Snapchat - @Dream

BadBoyHalo:    @thesaintsofgames
George:     @GeorgeNotFound
Sapnap:     @Sapnap
Antfrost:  @Antfrost
Awesamdude: @Awesamdude

Seed: 935327412
Version: 1.21.11

இந்தத் தொடரை Minecraft Manhunt என்று அழைக்க முடிவு செய்தோம். இந்த வீடியோ அதன் வித்தியாசமான பதிப்பு, இதில் ஐந்து வேட்டைக்காரர்கள் உள்ளனர். 5 வேட்டைக்காரர்கள் தொடரின் 6வது பதிப்பு, மறுமலர்ச்சி...

இது ஒரு புதிய Minecraft ஆனால், 1.21.11 சவாலை நாங்கள் முயற்சிக்க முடிவு செய்துள்ளோம். நான் விளையாட்டை வெல்ல முயற்சிக்கிறேன், அதே நேரத்தில் என் நண்பர்கள் ஜார்ஜ் மற்றும் சப்னாப் மற்றும் BadBoyHalo மற்றும் Antfrost ஆகியோர் அதைச் செய்வதைத் தடுக்க முயற்சிக்கிறார்கள். இது ஒரு பந்தயம், இது மிகவும் தீவிரமானது, எங்களுக்கு நிறைய சிரிப்புகள் இருந்தன. இந்த சவால்களைச் செய்வதை நான் விரும்புகிறேன்.

(Most) Music is from: ​⁠  @DreamproductionsXD

#MinecraftManhunt

Dette er en ny Minecraft men, 1.21.11 udfordring som vi har besluttet at prøve. Jeg forsøger at klare spillet, mens mine venner George og Sapnap og BadBoyHalo og Antfrost og Awesamdude forsøger at stoppe mig i at gøre det. Det er et ræs, og det er super intenst, og vi grinte meget. Jeg elsker at lave disse udfordringer.

Tohle je nová “Minecraft, ale…” challenge v 1.21.11, kterou jsme se rozhodli vyzkoušet. Snažím se vyhrát, zatímco se mi to moji kamarádi George a Sapnap a BadBoyHalo a Antfrost a Awesamdude snaží překazit. Je to super intenzivní závod, během kterého jsme se hodně nasmáli. Zbožňuju tyto výzvy.

Bọn tôi quyết định gọi series này là Minecraft Manhunt. Video này là một phiên bản khác của nó, trong đó có tới NĂM hunters. Phiên bản thứ 6 của series 5 thợ săn - sự phục sinh...

Đây là thử thách "Minecraft, nhưng" mới, phiên bản 1.21.11 mà chúng tôi quyết định thử nghiệm. Tôi cố gắng phá đảo trò chơi, trong khi bạn tôi George, Sapnap, Badboyhalo, Antfrost và Awesamdude cố ngăn chặn tôi thực hiện điều đó. Đây là một cuộc đua, cực kỳ căng thẳng và cũng mang lại cho chúng tôi rất nhiều tiếng cười. Tôi thực sự rất thích thực hiện những thử thách như thế này.

(Hầu hết) Nhạc lấy từ: ⁠    @DreamproductionsXD

snippet.title: Live Dohori Nepali | "चिन्तै नगर "Chintai Nagara - Shiva Hamal & Sita Shrestha
snippet.description:
Presenting the authentic Nepali Live Dohori song "Chintai Nagara" By Shiva Hamal & Sita Shrestha, brought to you by Music Nepal.

This folk melody reflects the culture, tradition, and heartfelt emotions of Nepali villages. A perfect combination of soulful lyrics, traditional instruments, and rhythmic beats. Enjoy the real taste of Nepali folk, Dohori, and regional music heritage.
Celebrate the spirit of Nepal through Music Nepal’s timeless Lok Geet collection.

लाईभ दोहोरी नेपाली लोकसंगीतका सबैभन्दा जीवन्त र अन्तरक्रियात्मक स्वरूपहरूमध्ये एक हो, जसलाई वास्तविक समयमा प्रस्तुत गरिन्छ र दर्शकहरूले पनि प्रायः सहभागिता जनाउँछन्। यो केवल संगीत प्रस्तुति मात्र होइन—यो सांस्कृतिक संवाद हो, जसले बुद्धि, ताल, र कथावाचनलाई मिसाउँछ।

🎶 Original Audio Credits:- 

🎬Video Link: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=S5bcoAGOj78

🎶 Original Audio Credits:-

snippet.title: Lord Huron - The Night We Met (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
⏬ Download / Stream: 
http://smarturl.it/iLHStrangeTrails

⚡️ Lord Huron:
https://www.instagram.com/lordhuron
https://www.facebook.com/lordhuron
https://x.com/lordhuron

⚡️ Creative Chaos:
https://soundcloud.com/creativchaos
https://open.spotify.com/user/creativchaos
https://www.tiktok.com/@creative.chaos_
https://www.facebook.com/creatvchaos
https://x.com/crevtivechaos
https://www.instagram.com/creativ.chaos

Lyrics:

[Intro]
(Ooh, ooh, ooh)
(Ooh, ooh, ooh)
(Ooh, ooh, ooh)
(Ooh, ooh, ooh)

[Verse 1]
I am not the only traveler
Who has not repaid his debt
I've been searching for a trail to follow again
Take me back to the night we met
And then I can tell myself
What the hell I'm supposed to do
And then I can tell myself
Not to ride along with you

[Chorus]
I had all and then most of you
Some and now none of you
Take me back to the night we met
I don't know what I'm supposed to do
Haunted by the ghost of you
Oh, take me back to the night we met

[Verse 2]
When the night was full of terrors
And your eyes were filled with tears
When you had not touched me yet
Oh, take me back to the night we met

[Chorus]
I had all and then most of you
Some and now none of you
Take me back to the night we met
I don't know what I'm supposed to do
Haunted by the ghost of you
Take me back to the night we met

🚫 If you want to use this music in your video you will need permission from the artist or label.

#LordHuron #TheNightWeMet #RockChaos #Rock #RockMusic #AlternativeRock #Alternative #AlternativeMusic #IndieRock #Indie #IndieMusic #Music #Vocals #Lyrics #LyricVideo #TopHits #Hits

snippet.title: Ekdev Limbu - Mana Ko Haal [Official Music Video]
snippet.description:
Mana Ko Haal is a heartfelt portrayal of love, vulnerability, and the unspoken emotions that live quietly within us. Through raw melodies and sincere lyrics, we have tried to capture the fragile state of a heart caught between longing, hope, and truth. The visuals mirror this emotional journey, bringing to life moments of connection, distance, and reflection that many hearts will recognize as their own. 

Follow Ekdev:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/ekdev.limbu/
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/EkdevLimbuThegim/

Listen to "Mana Ko Haal" now: https://ffm.to/manakohaal

Credits
Vocal, Composition & Lyrics: Ekdev Limbu
Cast: Mahek Shrestha

Audio Credits : 
Music Producer: Saswot Shrestha (Omniphonics Studio)
Mix and Master : Saswot Shrestha
Additional Composition / Lyrics: Dechen Phinasa, Salin Magar (Hook Studio)
Guitar: Bishal Chhetri, Bibek Rai
Drums: Neepesh Pariyar
Keys: Santosh Tamang

Video Credits : 
Directed by: Abhi Sampang Rai and Pragya Rai 
DOP: Ashesh Limbu, Prabin Mahato, Yogesh Rai (Chronicle Films)
Edit/Color: Bikesh Magar
Style/ MUA: Pragya Rai , Samasti Rai

Media Partner: Routine Of Nepali Music
Artist Manager: Bhaba Shrestha
Digital Manager: Ashim KC
For Business/Licensing inquiries: ekdevlimbu@gmail.com

Listen to Ekdev Limbu on:
▶︎ Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/artist/1jJGnkMQFNsCoDimuhJgIf
▶︎ Apple Music: https://music.apple.com/np/artist/ekdev-limbu/1501675497
▶︎ YouTube Playlist: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLDIJJN1N159Y_ayrr8nM0Vl4dBS9wi8zK

© 2026, All Rights Reserved by Ekdev Limbu.

After intense battles, clutch plays, and shifting leaderboards, teams are stepping in with momentum, pressure, and everything to prove.
Who’s rising, who’s holding on, and who’s about to turn the tables? Lock in and witness the action unfold live.

snippet.title: Bipul Chettri - Lopchu ko Orali (Official Visualiser)
snippet.description:
Lopchu, a small village in the Darjeeling hills, apart from its famous tea gardens is familiar to us as a spot to stop and relax for a bit while we journey on to various other places and journeys in life. So, even if it is for this brief moment, we give pause amongst mist, slow mornings, deep green slopes, and that calm, slightly melancholic beauty you only get in such mountain places. It carries a sense of stillness and depth, like something that doesn’t rush to explain itself. It belongs to memory.

Now streaming on all platforms.

MUSIC
Bipul Chettri - Vocals, Electric Guitar, Acoustic Guitar, Backing Vocals
Rahul Rai - Bass
Shantanu Sudarshan - Drums, Percussions
Prince Nepali - Sarangi, Tungna, Madal
Anindo Bose - Organ
Blue Notes School of Music Ensemble - Backing Vocals

Recorded by Jonty Indra, Anindo Bose & Binaya Man Amatya
Mixed & Mastered by Binaya Man Amatya

Lyrics, Composition & Arrangement - Bipul Chettri
Producer - Bipul Chettri
Executive Producer - Sonam Tashi

A Video by Gundruk

Shot by Pemba Tshering Tamang & Akash Pradhan

In Appearance
Sujit Subba, Palzer Lama, Passang Lamu Sherpa, Pratibha Subba, Aryan Rai, Jorden Sherpa, Nehal Pradhan

Drone video by Abhishek Painkra (abi_isiwaqt)
Trip managed by Trail Begins

We would like to extend our very special thanks to:
The Mukhian Homestay, Lopchu, Anmol Mukhia, Aaku Pema Dukpa & the amazing people of Lopchu.

All Rights Reserved by Bipul Chettri. 2026.

en.title: Bipul Chettri - Lopchu ko Orali (Official Visualiser)
en.description:
Lopchu, a small village in the Darjeeling hills, apart from its famous tea gardens is familiar to us as a spot to stop and relax for a bit while we journey on to various other places and journeys in life. So, even if it is for this brief moment, we give pause amongst mist, slow mornings, deep green slopes, and that calm, slightly melancholic beauty you only get in such mountain places. It carries a sense of stillness and depth, like something that doesn’t rush to explain itself. It belongs to memory.

Now streaming on all platforms.

MUSIC
Bipul Chettri - Vocals, Electric Guitar, Acoustic Guitar, Backing Vocals
Rahul Rai - Bass
Shantanu Sudarshan - Drums, Percussions
Prince Nepali - Sarangi, Tungna, Madal
Anindo Bose - Organ
Blue Notes School of Music Ensemble - Backing Vocals

Recorded by Jonty Indra, Anindo Bose & Binaya Man Amatya
Mixed & Mastered by Binaya Man Amatya

Lyrics, Composition & Arrangement - Bipul Chettri
Producer - Bipul Chettri
Executive Producer - Sonam Tashi

A Video by Gundruk

Shot by Pemba Tshering Tamang & Akash Pradhan

In Appearance
Sujit Subba, Palzer Lama, Passang Lamu Sherpa, Pratibha Subba, Aryan Rai, Jorden Sherpa, Nehal Pradhan

Drone video by Abhishek Painkra (abi_isiwaqt)
Trip managed by Trail Begins

We would like to extend our very special thanks to:
The Mukhian Homestay, Lopchu, Anmol Mukhia, Aaku Pema Dukpa & the amazing people of Lopchu.

All Rights Reserved by Bipul Chettri. 2026.

snippet.description:

Mind Relaxing - Shri Krishna Govind Hare Murari | Krishan Bhajan 2026 श्री कृष्ण गोविंद हरे मुरारी

🙏 जो भी श्रद्धा और विश्वास के साथ इस मंत्र को सुनता है—
उसके जीवन में शांति, सुख, भक्ति और सकारात्मक ऊर्जा आती है।

🪔 कहा जाता है कि यह मंत्र सुनने से:
✔️ मन शांत होता है
✔️ नकारात्मक ऊर्जा दूर होती है
✔️ घर में सकारात्मकता बढ़ती है
✔️ मन में भक्ति और प्रेम जागता है
✔️ तनाव, डर और चिंता समाप्त होती है

💖 Mantra Lyrics:

Shri Krishna Govind Hare Murare
Hey Nath Narayan Vasudeva

🌿 Headphones लगाकर 108 बार इस मंत्र को सुनें और अनुभव करें:

✨ शांति
✨ भक्ति
✨ प्रेम
✨ दिव्य ऊर्जा

अगर यह मंत्र आपके दिल को शांति दे —
तो Like ❤️, Share 🔁 और Comment में “जय श्री कृष्णा 🙏” अवश्य लिखें।

snippet.title: Franklin play hide and kill with hulk - Indian bike driving 3D
snippet.description:
Franklin play hide and kill with hulk - Indian bike driving 3D
Hello friends, in this video Franklin and Shinchan will play hide and kill with colorful Hulks and on the occasion of Republic Day, whoever wins will get a Ninja bike. I have done face cam. This is a fun video made with funny ministers.


Disclaimer:
"This video is for entertainment and educational purposes only. The gameplay shown is from fictional video games: Indian Bike Driving 3D and GTA V.
Fictional Content: All characters, events, and incidents shown in this video are purely fictional and have no relation to real-life people or events.
Safety Warning: Do not attempt to recreate any stunts, driving, or actions shown in this video in real life. These acts are performed by professionals in a virtual environment and can be dangerous if performed in reality.
Copyright: This video is made under the 'Fair Use' guidelines for the purpose of commentary and entertainment. All rights belong to their respective owners (Rockstar Games and Rohit Gaming Studio).

snippet.title: अल्लारे नानी केसी "Allare Nani Kesi" Yubaraj Portel(Cover Remake) | Old is Gold | Music Nepal
snippet.description:
Experience a fresh take on the timeless Nepali folk classic, "Allare Nani Kesi." Originally composed and sung by the legendary Jhalakman Gandharva, this remake version is beautifully reimagined by Yubaraj Portel only on Music Nepal's Official YouTube Channel.

This version brings modern production while keeping the soulful essence of the Sarangi and the traditional Gandharva roots alive for a new generation.

"अल्लारे नानी" (Allare Nani Kesi) एउटा कालजयी नेपाली लोक गीत हो।  युवराज पोर्टेलको रिमेक संस्करण र झलकमान गन्धर्वको मौलिक (Original) संस्करणमा,

This folk melody reflects the culture, tradition, and heartfelt emotions of Nepali villages. A perfect combination of soulful lyrics, traditional instruments, and rhythmic beats.
Enjoy the real taste of Nepali Lok Geet Dohori and regional music heritage. Celebrate the spirit of Nepal through Music Nepal’s timeless Lok Geet collection, bringing together authentic Nepali folk sounds. Experience soulful traditional music with rich melodies and heartfelt folk emotions.  A beautiful blend of lok dohori and classic traditional rhythms that portray love, devotion, culture, and village life.  

• Song Title: Allare Nani Kesi

• Original Singer/Composer/Lyricist: Jhalakman Gandharva

• Remake Vocals: Yubaraj Portel

• Arranger: Binod Kumar Bhujel

• Studio = Music Nepal 

• Record = Nakul Karki 

• Mixing/ Mastering = Prakash Kharel, Gobinda Soni 

• Special help = Monika Chudal 

• Genre: Nepali Folk / Fusion

Video credits 
• Cast: Asha B.C.
          Bikki Portel
          Raju Singh 

• Co- Artist:
                  Raju century 
                  Bikram gahatraj 
                  Sunill dhamala
                  Nabin (Gold King) 
                  Sujan comrade 
                  N.B. Narayan Ghimire 
                  Shambhu lagun 

Special thanks -  Subash Khadka 

• Makeup: Poonam Chaudhary
• Light:
      Ramesh Parajuli 
      Harka Pahari 
      Anish mager 
• Cinematography: Dinesh Parajuli 
• Poster: Rakesh Dahal 
• Edit / Colour: Milan Bishwokarma 
• Producer: Trisha / Aryan 
• Choreographer: Shyam Pattel 
• Concept / Direction: Khem Nath Khanal

🎧 Label: Yubaraj Portel/Music Nepal
📅 Release Year: 2026
🌐 Category: Music

All Rights Reserved. 

Unauthorized downloading or duplication of this video may result in copyright claims or strikes by YouTube.

snippet.title: Arijit Singh - Qaafirana | Sushant Singh Rajput & Sara Ali Khan | Kedarnath | Full Video
snippet.description:
Song: Qaafirana
Movie: Kedarnath
Singers: Arijit Singh & Nikita Gandhi
Lyrics: Amitabh Bhattacharya
Music: Amit Trivedi
Starring: Sushant Singh Rajput (Remembering), Sara Ali Khan

Qaafirana Lyrics

Lyrics:

In vaadiyon mein
Takra chuke hain
Humse musafir
Yun toh kayi

Dil na lagaya
Humne kisi se
Qisse sune hain
Yun toh kayi

Aise tum mile ho 
Aise tum mile ho
Jaise mil rahi ho
Itr se havaa.. .. 

Qaafirana sa hai
Ishq hai ya kya hai

Aise tum mile ho 
Aise tum mile ho
Jaise mil rahi ho
Itr se havaa.. .. 

Qaafirana sa hai
Ishq hai ya kya hai

Godi mein pahadiyon ki
Ujli dopheri guzaarna
Tere saath mein..
Accha lage.. 

Dhalti huyi sham ne
Bataya hai ke door manzil pe
Raat Hai..

Mujhko tasalli hai yeh
Ke hone talak raat
Hum dono saath hai ..

Sang chal rahe hai
Sang chal rahe hai
Dhoop ke kinare
Chaaon ki tarah

Qaafirana sa hai
Ishq hai ya kya hai

Aise tum mile ho
Aise tum mile ho
Jaise mil rahi ho

Itr se havaa.. .. 

Qaafirana sa hai
Ishq hai ya kya hai

snippet.title: ROAD TO 126 OVR Begins!
snippet.description:
The road to 126 OVR continues! Today, I finally assemble the dream trio: 117 Lionel Messi, 117 Cristiano Ronaldo, and 117 Ruud Gullit.

In this video, I go all-in on the TOTY Draft Packs to hunt down the best attackers in the game. My pack luck was absolutely insane. I packed 117 Cristiano Ronaldo and 117 Lionel Messi in the same recording session!

After securing the attack, I moved to the Defenders pack to find Ruud Gullit. It was a struggle (so many Van Dijk duplicates!), but we finally completed the squad.

🔥 PACK OPENING HIGHLIGHTS:

PACKED 117 CRISTIANO RONALDO (The Suii!) 🇵🇹

PACKED 117 LIONEL MESSI (The Goat!) 🇦🇷

PACKED 117 VIRGIL VAN DIJK (Multiple times!) 🇳🇱

Completing the Ruud Gullit Exchange ✅

Reaching 125 OVR & Gameplay 🎮

📩 Business Inquiries → *rkreddy@digitalsportsmgmt.com*

snippet.title: Diwana Hai Ye Man (Lyrical Video) | Sonu Nigam | Alka Yagnik Anu Malik | Chori Chori Chupke Chupke
snippet.description:
"Diwana Hai Ye Man" from the film Chori Chori Chupke Chupke is a melodious romantic track sung by Sonu Nigam and Alka Yagnik, with music composed by Anu Malik. Featuring Salman Khan and Rani Mukerji, the song captures the fluttering emotions of love, innocence, and heartfelt longing. With its soothing melody, expressive vocals, and early-2000s Bollywood charm, this track remains a memorable and evergreen romantic favorite. 

Credits: 
Singer: Sonu Nigam, Alka Yagnik
Music: Anu Malik
Lyrics: Sameer
Movie: Chori Chori Chupke Chupke
Starring: Salman Khan, Rani Mukerji
Director: Abbas Mustan
Producer: Nazim Rizvi
Label: Universal Music India

Lyrics: 

Deewana Hain Yeh Man Kyon Pagal Hai Dhadkan 

Kyon Tujhpe Mujhe Pyaar Aaya Hai 

Yeh Mausam Kyon Saje Yeh Payal Kyon Baje 

Yeh Kaisa Khumar Chhaya Hai 

Koi Bata De Koi Bata De Koi Bataye Na 

Yeh Main Janoon Ya Tu Jaane 

Is Baat Ko Koi Kya Jaane 

Dil Tera Mera Dil Jhoome Re Jhoome 

Dil Tera Mera Dil Jhoome Re Jhoome 

Maine Teri Dhadkanon Pe Sanam 

Apni Wafa Ki Kahani Likhi 

Maine Tere Naam Jaan-e-Jigar 

Apni Haseen Zindagani Likhi 

Yeh Kajal Kyon Hase, Yeh Naina Kyon Jhuke 

Yeh Kaisa Nikhar Mujhpe Aaya Hain 

Koi Bata De Koi Bata De Koi Bataye Na 

Yeh Main Janoon Ya Tu Jaane 

Is Baat Ko Koi Kya Jaane 

Dil Tera Mera Dil Jhoome Re Jhoome 

Dil Tera Mera Dil Jhoome Re Jhoome 

O Mere Rabba Tera Shukriya 

Jo Maine Maanga Mujhe Mil Gaya 

Meri Mohabbat Asar Kar Gayi 

Khwabon Ka Mehka Chaman Khil Gaya 

Yeh Bandhan Kyon Bandhe, Yeh Rishte Kyon Jude 

Yeh Mausam Kya Sandesha Laaya Hai 

Koi Bata De Koi Bata De Koi Bataye Na 

Yeh Main Janoon Ya Tu Jaane 

Is Baat Ko Koi Kya Jaane 

Deewana Hain Yeh Man Kyon Pagal Hai Dhadkan 

Kyon Tujhpe Mujhe Pyaar Aaya Hai 

Yeh Mausam Kyon Saje Yeh Payal Kyon Baje 

Yeh Kaisa Khumar Chhaya Hai 

Koi Bata De Koi Bata De Koi Bataye Na 

Yeh Main Janoon Ya Tu Jaane 

Is Baat Ko Koi Kya Jaane 

Dil Tera Mera Dil Jhoome Re Jhoome 

Dil Tera Mera Dil Jhoome Re Jhoome

Koi Bata De Koi Bata De Koi Bataye Na 

Yeh Main Janoon Ya Tu Jaane 

Is Baat Ko Koi Kya Jaane

O Mere Rabba Tera Shukriya 

Jo Maine Maanga Mujhe Mil Gaya 

Meri Mohabbat Asar Kar Gayi 

Khwabon Ka Mehka Chaman Khil Gaya

en.title: Diwana Hai Ye Man (Lyrical Video) | Sonu Nigam | Alka Yagnik Anu Malik | Chori Chori Chupke Chupke
en.description:
"Diwana Hai Ye Man" from the film Chori Chori Chupke Chupke is a melodious romantic track sung by Sonu Nigam and Alka Yagnik, with music composed by Anu Malik. Featuring Salman Khan and Rani Mukerji, the song captures the fluttering emotions of love, innocence, and heartfelt longing. With its soothing melody, expressive vocals, and early-2000s Bollywood charm, this track remains a memorable and evergreen romantic favorite.

snippet.title: 1 Hour Nonstop मेरे तन में भी राम मेरे मन में भी राम   Ram Naam Jap   Powerful Ram Bhajan
snippet.description:
#ramdhun #hindibhajan #rambhajan
1 Hour Nonstop Ram Dhun | मेरे तन में भी राम मेरे मन में भी राम | Ram Naam Jap | Powerful Ram Bhajan

Song: 1 Hour Nonstop Ram Dhun | मेरे तन में भी राम मेरे मन में भी राम | Ram Naam Jap | Powerful Ram Bhajan
Lyrics, Music & Composer: Naresh ji  
Singer : Shiv Hi 
Editing: RAm ji 
Recording Studio :  Recording Studio
Music Label : New Rasiya Hits 

Presenting this beautiful and peaceful Ram Dhun to fill your mind with positive energy and devotion to Lord Ram.

यह हृदय को छूने वाला भजन *"मेरे तन में भी राम मेरे मन में भी राम" आपके जीवन के सभी कष्टों को दूर करेगा। इस **नॉनस्टॉप राम नाम जाप को सुनकर सुबह की शुरुआत करें या रात को शांति प्राप्त करें।

Lyrics - 

मेरे तन में भी राम, मेरे मन में भी राम
मेरे कण कण में राम, मेरे मन मन में राम
रोम रोम में समाया तेरा नाम रे
हाय मेरी साँसों में तेरा ही नाम रे
हाय मेरी साँसों में तेरा ही नाम रे

जैसे चंदा में राम, जैसे सूरज में राम
जैसे चंदा में राम, जैसे सूरज में राम
अंबर तारों में समाया तेरा नाम रे
हाय मेरी साँसों में तेरा ही नाम रे
हाय मेरी साँसों में तेरा ही नाम रे

जैसे सीता के राम, जैसे राधा के श्याम
जैसे सीता के राम, जैसे राधा के श्याम
नर नारी में समाया तेरा नाम रे
हाय मेरी साँसों में तेरा ही नाम रे
हाय मेरी साँसों में तेरा ही नाम रे

जैसे शबरी के राम, जैसे मीरा के श्याम
जैसे शबरी के राम, जैसे मीरा के श्याम
पत्ते पत्ते में समाया तेरा नाम रे
हाय मेरी साँसों में तेरा ही नाम रे
हाय मेरी साँसों में तेरा ही नाम रे




Nonstop Ram Dhun Continuous chanting for high focus and meditation.
Ram Naam Jap Best way to purify your thoughts.
Mere Tan Mein Bhi Ram Mere Mann Mein Bhi Ram The powerful lyric that inspires devotion.
Ram Siya Ram The ultimate mantra for peace and happiness.

📌 Keywords: Ram Dhun 2025, Ram Naam Jap Bhajan, मेरे तन में भी राम मेरे मन में भी राम, Shri Ram Bhajan, Ram Devotional Song, Ram Mantra Jap, Ram Naam Stotra, Shri Ram Ka Bhajan, Bajao Bhakti, 1 Hour Ram Dhun, Nonstop Ram Dhun

#ramdhun #ramnaam #rambhajan #bhajan #hindibhajan

snippet.title: YABI - AJAVOLI ft. BLUESSS ( OFFICIAL AUDIO )
snippet.description:
Track 2 from the BOOMERANG mixtape, “Ajavoli” featuring Bluesss, delivers smooth melodies and emotional storytelling. A song about love, reflection, and feelings that never fade, this track shows a softer but powerful side of Yabi The Goat.


Heartfelt thanks to RACHANA DAHAL  for the beautiful back vocals. Your voice added depth, emotion, and soul to this track. Truly grateful for your support and talent.

‘Ajavoli’ is inspired by the original song by Sudip Giri. The emotions, melody, and soul of the original track sparked a new creative direction, allowing this version to reflect personal experiences while honoring the essence and artistry of the original work. Much respect to Sudip Giri for the inspiration.”


℗ 2026 Yabi The Goat. All rights reserved. Unauthorized use or re-upload of this content is prohibited.

snippet.title: 2 Minecraft Pros VS 1000 Hunters
snippet.description:
On the Unstable SMP, LettuceK is currently beating every other candidate in the election by 6,000 votes. The only way to beat him, is to bring Wemmbu back to spawn and prove that he's been lying this whole time. This is 2 Minecraft Pros VS 1000 Hunters. 

Unstable SMP:
➜ ‪  @wemmbumc 
➜ ‪  @FlameFragsMC 
➜ ‪  @Spokeishere 
➜ ‪  @ParrotX2 

Like ParrotX2 and his Unstable SMP series, where he is escaping Paragon / Proton: Minecraft's Most Secure Prison, or got hunted by a Minecraft Player who doesn't exist. This is a new and original Minecraft idea like HermitCraft or Lifesteal with Wemmbu, FlameFrags, or Spoke. Survival is harder than Hardcore Minecraft because PVP is on.

People in this video: @wemmbumc @LettuceK @TheobaldTheBird @CoinMonkeExtras @PurpledMC @Boosfer 

Original music by  @tsynphonia 

This is a video on the Unstable Universe: a staged Minecraft server where ParrotX2, Wemmbu, Spoke, and FlameFrags tell stories in Minecraft.

A Minecraft video made by Parrot or ParrotX2 on other platforms! Enjoy!

snippet.description:
Today I spent alot of robux for alien lucky blocks in escape tsunami for brainrots. Make sure you watch the whole video to find out what happens. 

FOLTYN MERCH: https://foltyn.shop/

--Socials--

Discord: https://discord.gg/hqwZhrkqRr

Roblox Group: https://www.roblox.com/groups/1177555...

Roblox Name: TheRealFoltyn

Insta: https://www.instagram.com/foltynn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

snippet.description:

Roblox Group: https://www.roblox.com/groups/11775558/Foltyns-Family#!/about

Roblox Name: TheRealFoltyn

Insta: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

#Roblox #foltyn

snippet.title: I Explored the Minecraft Farlands
snippet.description:
the end of the world

I Explored the Minecraft Farlands

Unstable SMP:
➜  @FlameFragsMC 
➜  ⁨@Spokeishere 
➜  @ParrotX2 
➜  ⁨@wemmbumc 

minor spoilers below

music from:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC9UKPs9ZisfhMJdalnETLRg (tons of the music I use is by AZALI so check him out!) 
https://www.youtube.com/@andreaszoeller (all of the minecraft theme remixes!)

This is a Minecraft video recorded in the Unstable Universe / Unstable SMP that is staged for story-telling purposes; any more staged videos I upload will have a disclaimer in the description saying that they are also staged. Also, a lot of the game mechanics/glitches/redstone discussed in Unstable SMP videos are unique to the Unstable SMP / Unstable Universe and either will not work the same/do not exist in vanilla Minecraft. 

music also from: official minecraft soundtrack, official elder scrolls soundtracks, official enderal soundtrack, epidemic sound (https://www.epidemicsound.com), storyblocks (https://www.storyblocks.com), artlist (https://artlist.io), soundstripe (https://www.soundstripe.com), fesliyan studios (https://www.fesliyanstudios.com/royalty-free-music), and envato (https://elements.envato.com/)

snippet.title: Full Animation | Free Fire x Jujutsu Kaisen | Free Fire Official
snippet.description:
🔥 Free Fire x Jujutsu Kaisen collaboration is HERE! ⚡Sorcerers and Cursed Spirits collide, and the fight for survival begins! Watch the full animation and join the battle alongside Jujutsu Sorcerers! 💥
14 Jan - 13 Feb
Play Free Fire during the event to collect Cursed Energy and unlock special Jujutsu Kaisen collab items!
· Use Divergent Fist, Unlimited Void, and other jujutsu abilities in BR to turn fights in your favor!
· Head to the Free Fire-style Jujutsu High School and take on special event missions!
· Collect 10 FREE Sukuna Vouchers and spin for the Ryomen Sukuna Bundle, and more iconic Jujutsu Kaisen character bundles ahead!
· Complete missions to earn FREE Yuji Itadori Bundle as the grand prize and unlock an exclusive Battle Card!
· Don’t forget to claim more FREE Jujutsu rewards, including Jujutsu Kaisen Parachute, Banner, Avatar, Monster Truck, Satoru Gojo-themed Gloo Wall, and more!
Event details may vary across regions.

#FreeFirexJujutsuKaisen #FreeFire #JujutsuKaisen
